items.title: Saka trains with England squad before Ghana match
items.summary: Bukayo Saka trains with the England squad to provide a fitness boost to Thomas Tuchel before their second World Cup match against Ghana.

items.title: Cape Verde fan goes wild over first goal live on BBC News
items.summary: During a live BBC News broadcast, reporter Paul Njie interviews a Cape Verde fan when the country suddenly scores its first ever World Cup goal against Uruguay in the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: Uruguay star who was frozen out for nearly two years for the most bizarre reason scores at the World Cup
items.summary: MARCELO BIELSA'S reign as Uruguay boss has never been short of drama. But few fallouts have been quite as bizarre as the one involving Agustin Canobbio – a player who was effectively banished after being criticised for THE WAY HE SAT in a team meeting. items.title: Viral Cape Verde goalkeeper’s mum goes wild in stands after US government waived visa fees to let her come to World Cup
items.summary: CAPE VERDE cult hero Vozinha was cheered on by his proud mum after the US Government stepped in to help make her World Cup dream come true.
